questions.question: Which state is the host of ‘Krishnaveni Sangeetha Neerajanam’ event?
questions.explanation: Union Minister of Finance and Corporate Affairs, Nirmala Sitharaman inaugurated Krishnaveni Sangeetha Neerajanam, at TummalapalliKalakshetram, Vijayawada in Andhra Pradesh. This three-day classical music extravaganza will host a variety of activities, including classical music performances by renowned musicians of the country and an exhibition and sale of regional cuisine, local handicrafts and handlooms. The event provides an enchanting glimpse into the Indian classical music heritage and featured a diverse array of performances by accomplished musicians.

questions.question: Which institution launched a comprehensive programme to combat air pollution crisis in India?
questions.explanation: In response to India’s escalating air pollution crisis, the World Bank has launched a comprehensive program aimed at curbing the impact of ambient particulate matter (PM)2.5 pollution. According to the World Bank, the initiative includes the introduction of airshed management tools, the development of State-wide Air Quality Action Plans, and the creation of the first extensive Regional Airshed Action Plan for the Indo-Gangetic Plains (IGP), covering seven union territories and states.

questions.question: India’s first six lane ‘steel slag-based road’ has been constructed in which state?
questions.explanation: Steel Slag is generated as a solid waste during steel production. For every tonne of steel production, around 180 – 200 kg of steel slag is generated in the integrated steel plants. Ministry of Steel has funded a R&D project on “Development of Design Guidelines and Specifications for utilization of steel slag in road construction” being pursued by CSIR-CRRI in association with the steel industry. Under this project, India’s first six lane steel slag-based road connecting NH-6 to Hazira port was constructed in 2022 at Surat. In this 1 km long test section, processed Electric Arc Furnace (EAF)/ CONARC slag from Arcelor Mittal Nippon Steel steel plant at Hazira has been used.

questions.question: Captain Fatima Wasim created history by becoming the first woman medical officer to be deployed at__:
questions.explanation: Captain Fatima Wasim created history by becoming the first woman medical officer to be deployed at an operational post in the world’s highest battlefield, the Siachen Glacier. After rigorous training at the Siachen Battle School, she was inducted to a post at Partapur sector at an altitude of 15,200 feet in the Union Territory of Ladakh. Her posting is seen as a major milestone for women empowerment in the armed forces.

questions.question: Scientists from the Department of Atomic Energy (DAE) and Bengaluru-based IDRS Labs have collaborated to develop Aktocyte tablets for the treatment of which disease?
questions.explanation: Scientists from the Department of Atomic Energy (DAE) and Bengaluru-based IDRS Labs have collaborated to develop Aktocyte tablets for the treatment of pelvic cancer. These tablets are designed to supplement cancer radiotherapy, functioning as a regenerative nutraceutical, immunomodulator, and antioxidant. The collaboration involves experts from the Bhabha Atomic Research Centre, Tata Memorial Hospital, and the Advanced Centre for Training Research and Education in Cancer, along with IDRS Labs. The primary aim of this collaborative effort is to minimize the side effects of radiotherapy, which often impact patients’ quality of life. Aktocyte tablets have multiple innovative functions, supporting natural healing processes, enhancing the immune response to cancer cells, and protecting healthy cells from damage during radiotherapy. Aktocyte has received approval from the Food Safety and Standards Authority of India (FSSAI), ensuring its safety and quality standards. This development revolutionizes pelvic cancer care, offering a promising solution with multifunctional properties and regulatory approval.

questions.question: Which is the implementing agency for Indian forest and Wood Certification Scheme, that was introduced recently?

options.label: A
options.text: Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change

options.label: C
options.text: Indian Council of Forestry Research and Education

questions.explanation: The Ministry of Environment, Forests and Climate Change has introduced the Indian Forest & Wood Certification Scheme. This voluntary national certification initiative aims to encourage sustainable forest management and agroforestry practices in India. The scheme encompasses forest management certification, tree outside forest management certification, and chain of custody certification. The Indian Forest and Wood Certification Council will oversee the scheme, acting as a multistakeholder advisory body. The Indian Institute of Forest Management, Bhopal, will serve as the scheme’s operating agency, managing its overall implementation.

questions.question: What is ‘Bhashini’ that was recently making news?
questions.explanation: Bhashini is an AI-led language translation system that enables people to speak in their own language while talking to speakers of other Indian languages. Its aim is to facilitate convenient internet and digital service accessibility in Indian languages, incorporating voice-based access, and fostering the generation of content in these languages. Recently, Prime Minister Narendra Modi utilized ‘Bhashini’ during his speech at the Kashi Tamil Sangamam event in Varanasi on December 18th. This aided those in the audience more conversant in Tamil to comprehend his Hindi address. The use of such technology for language translation was a new beginning per the Prime Minister, potentially easing communication barriers.

questions.question: Which city houses the world’s largest diamond bourse inaugurated by PM Modi recently?
questions.explanation: Prime Minister Modi inaugurated the Surat Diamond Bourse near Surat city of Gujarat, which is deemed the global centerpiece for the international diamond trading market with over 4,500 offices across 67 lakh square feet of space. Positioned as a hub for import-export, retail and banking, this structure inside the DREAM City complex supersedes prior records for floor area dedicated to the precious stone industry.

questions.question: The Lingaraj Temple, that was recently making news, is located in which city of Odisha?
questions.explanation: Odisha government launched the Lingaraj Ekamra Kshetra Amenities and Monuments Revival Action (EKAMRA) scheme in January 2020, focused on restoring and improving amenities at the 11th century Lingaraj Temple and 30 other shrines across 80 acres in Bhubaneswar. It aims to enhance the experience for devotees while preserving heritage value, including beautification, better access roads and removing encroachments. The Lingaraj temple holds religious significance as a prominent Hindu and tourist site. This scheme elevates Bhubaneswar’s status as a “Temple City” while boosting Odisha’s cultural identity under CM Naveen Patnaik’s initiative to rejuvenate spiritual centers across the state.

questions.question: Solar Dynamics Observatory, that recently observed the largest solar flare in years, belongs to which state agency?
questions.explanation: NASA’s Solar Dynamics Observatory operated by the American space agency observed an intense solar flare this week – the most significant since 2017 – measuring X1 on scale. Originating from active sunspot region AR3213, it unleashed a burst of radio waves causing temporary disturbance in communication frequencies across the Western Hemisphere during daytime. Scientists are monitoring the area for potential large-scale plasma eruption that can trigger geomagnetic storms if earth-directed. As the sun nears mid-point of its 11-year cycle, peaking activity could make such disruptions more likely per NASA.
